name: Steal Eggs: Age of Guns
description: Defeat the opponent approaching your territory and go to the opponents egg to steal small eggs to take back to your own egg. Have fun!
instructions: Keyboard P1 W A S D P1 Fire S P2 Arrow Key P2 Fire Down Arrow Key Mobile P1 On-screen red arrow keys P2 On-screen blue arrow keys
tags: 2 Player, 2D, Action, Adventure, Android, Animal, Arcade, Arena, Bird, Defense, Gun, Pixel, Sword, Tower Defense
